candidate_recall_failure.definition: Gold evidence is absent from the frozen candidate pool.
candidate_recall_failure.criteria: No Gold block appears within candidate_pool_k after generic scoring.
candidate_recall_failure.observable_evidence: gold_candidate_rank is null or exceeds candidate_pool_k.

dense_rank_failure.criteria: Gold dense score/rank is materially worse than non-supporting candidates.
dense_rank_failure.observable_evidence: Requires a source trace containing dense_score; unavailable in the frozen Stage 13 trace.

lexical_rank_failure.criteria: Gold lexical score/rank is materially worse despite relevant terminology.
lexical_rank_failure.observable_evidence: Requires a source trace containing lexical_score; unavailable in the frozen Stage 13 trace.

fusion_rank_failure.definition: Gold evidence reaches the candidate pool but not final Top-10.
fusion_rank_failure.criteria: Gold rank is within candidate_pool_k and greater than final context k.
fusion_rank_failure.observable_evidence: Candidate and selected ranks from the deterministic replay.

evidence_role_mismatch.definition: A supporting block is assigned an incompatible evidence role.
evidence_role_mismatch.criteria: Gold evidence roles do not intersect the routed required roles.
evidence_role_mismatch.observable_evidence: Gold evidence_roles and router profile filters.

block_type_filter_error.definition: A supporting block is rejected by generic block/evidence eligibility.
block_type_filter_error.criteria: A Gold block exists but eligible_for_final_context is false.
block_type_filter_error.observable_evidence: Block type, evidence roles, and rejection reasons.

section_rule_error.definition: Section compatibility rules incorrectly suppress supporting evidence.
section_rule_error.criteria: Gold is eligible but section scoring/caps exclude it.
section_rule_error.observable_evidence: Section title, section score, candidate rank, packing trace.

context_budget_truncation.definition: Selected support is removed by the final token budget.
context_budget_truncation.criteria: Gold is selected before packing and appears in a truncation trace.
context_budget_truncation.observable_evidence: Pre-pack selection and context packing trace.

page_hit_block_miss.definition: The context reaches a Gold page but not an exact Gold block.

multi_block_evidence_required.definition: A claim requires a set of blocks rather than one block.
multi_block_evidence_required.criteria: No individual block directly supports the complete claim.
multi_block_evidence_required.observable_evidence: Claim text, Gold blocks, neighbors, and human source inspection.

gold_granularity_too_narrow.definition: Gold omits equivalent directly supporting evidence.
gold_granularity_too_narrow.criteria: Human review confirms a non-Gold block is equally valid support.
gold_granularity_too_narrow.observable_evidence: Gold, candidate, neighbor, and source comparison.

gold_granularity_too_broad.definition: A Gold block contains materially broader content than needed.
gold_granularity_too_broad.criteria: Human review finds only a smaller span directly supports the claim.
gold_granularity_too_broad.observable_evidence: Gold block and sentence-level source inspection.

equivalent_non_gold_evidence.definition: Selected non-Gold evidence directly supports the same claim.
equivalent_non_gold_evidence.criteria: Human review confirms semantic and factual equivalence.
equivalent_non_gold_evidence.observable_evidence: Selected text versus Gold and source context.

parsing_boundary_error.definition: Parsing split or merged source text across incorrect block boundaries.
parsing_boundary_error.criteria: Direct support is fragmented, missing, or attached to a wrong page/block.
parsing_boundary_error.observable_evidence: PDF/source comparison, block neighbors, unusually short fragments.

claim_role_unknown.definition: The derived claim role is unknown and uses the safe generic route.

query_formulation_failure.definition: The retrieval query lacks terms needed to locate support.
query_formulation_failure.criteria: Human review confirms the query under-specifies the evidence need.
query_formulation_failure.observable_evidence: Retrieval query, required claims, and candidate scores.

multi_paper_allocation_failure.definition: Candidate or context allocation fails to preserve all target papers.
multi_paper_allocation_failure.criteria: A multi-paper query omits at least one required paper.
multi_paper_allocation_failure.observable_evidence: Target papers, selected paper distribution, per-paper ranks.

metric_exact_match_limitation.definition: Strict block identity misses valid evidence at another granularity.
metric_exact_match_limitation.criteria: Human review confirms support while exact Gold block identity is absent.
metric_exact_match_limitation.observable_evidence: Strict metric result and approved alternative evidence mapping.

unknown.definition: Available automatic evidence cannot determine a cause.
